steps.title: Define torsional heating
steps.content: The notes state that torsion is twisting and that objects generally heat up when twisted. An explanation of torsional heating should combine those ideas into a definition of temperature increase caused by twisting.

steps.title: Reject examples without definition
steps.content:
• Choice A compares two fibers' results but does not define the concept.
  • Choice C is too vague because change could mean increase or decrease, while the notes specify heating.
  • Choice D describes the 2019 study rather than explaining what torsional heating is.
The answer is B.
